---
title: "IRF diagnostics: pooled and state-level"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
```

## Data prep

```{r}
base <- read.csv("aggregate_state_monthly_shock_h2m.csv") |>
  mutate(
    uf_code = as.integer(uf_code),
    year = as.integer(year),
    month_num = as.integer(month_num),
    date = as.integer(date)
  )

# output locations
results_dir <- "results"
csv_dir <- file.path(results_dir, "tables")
png_dir <- file.path(results_dir, "plots")
state_png_dir <- file.path(png_dir, "state_irf")
dir.create(csv_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(state_png_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

uf_lookup <- tibble(
  uf_code = c(11,12,13,14,15,16,17,21,22,23,24,25,26,27,28,29,31,32,33,35,41,42,43,50,51,52,53),
  state_name_std = c("Rondonia","Acre","Amazonas","Roraima","Para","Amapa","Tocantins","Maranhao","Piaui","Ceara","Rio Grande do Norte","Paraiba","Pernambuco","Alagoas","Sergipe","Bahia","Minas Gerais","Espirito Santo","Rio de Janeiro","Sao Paulo","Parana","Santa Catarina","Rio Grande do Sul","Mato Grosso do Sul","Mato Grosso","Goias","Distrito Federal"),
  macro_region_std = c("North","North","North","North","North","North","North","Northeast","Northeast","Northeast","Northeast","Northeast","Northeast","Northeast","Northeast","Northeast","Southeast","Southeast","Southeast","Southeast","South","South","South","Center-West","Center-West","Center-West","Center-West")
)

name_candidates <- c("state_name","state","uf_name","uf","nome","nome_estado","state_nm")
macro_candidates <- c("macro_region","region","macroregion","macro_reg","regiao","region_name","region_nm")
name_col <- intersect(name_candidates, names(base))[1]
macro_col <- intersect(macro_candidates, names(base))[1]

base <- base |>
  left_join(uf_lookup, by = "uf_code") |>
  mutate(
    state_name = if (!is.na(name_col)) as.character(.data[[name_col]]) else state_name_std,
    state_name = ifelse(is.na(state_name) | state_name == "", state_name_std, state_name),
    macro_region = if (!is.na(macro_col)) as.character(.data[[macro_col]]) else macro_region_std,
    macro_region = ifelse(is.na(macro_region) | macro_region == "", macro_region_std, macro_region),
    uf_label = paste0(uf_code, " - ", state_name)
  )

n_states <- base |> distinct(uf_code) |> nrow()
full_months <- base |>
  group_by(date) |>
  summarize(
    n_states_present = n_distinct(uf_code),
    all_complete = all(!is.na(consumption_index) & !is.na(mp_shock) & !is.na(share_PH2M_linear) & !is.na(share_WH2M_linear) & !is.na(share_PH2M_nearest) & !is.na(share_WH2M_nearest)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(n_states_present == n_states, all_complete) |>
  pull(date)

panel <- base |>
  filter(date %in% full_months) |>
  arrange(uf_code, date) |>
  group_by(uf_code) |>
  mutate(
    log_c = log(consumption_index),
    lag_log_c = lag(log_c, 1),
    lag_mp_shock = lag(mp_shock, 1)
  ) |>
  ungroup()
```

## Functions

```{r}
horizons <- 0:12

safe_get <- function(ct, term) {
  if (inherits(ct, "try-error") || !(term %in% rownames(ct))) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_))
  c(unname(ct[term, "Estimate"]), unname(ct[term, "Std. Error"]))
}

wild_cluster_ci <- function(model, data, cluster_var, term, B = 399, seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)
  cl <- as.character(data[[cluster_var]])
  clu <- unique(cl)
  fit <- as.numeric(fitted(model))
  res <- as.numeric(residuals(model))
  y_name <- all.vars(formula(model))[1]
  bvec <- numeric(B)
  for (b in seq_len(B)) {
    w <- sample(c(-1, 1), length(clu), replace = TRUE)
    names(w) <- clu
    y_star <- fit + res * w[cl]
    d_star <- data
    d_star[[y_name]] <- y_star
    m_star <- try(lm(formula(model), data = d_star), silent = TRUE)
    bvec[b] <- if (inherits(m_star, "try-error")) NA_real_ else unname(coef(m_star)[term])
  }
  bvec <- bvec[!is.na(bvec)]
  c(lo = as.numeric(quantile(bvec, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)), hi = as.numeric(quantile(bvec, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)))
}

wild_state_ci <- function(model, term, B = 399, seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)
  fit <- as.numeric(fitted(model))
  res <- as.numeric(residuals(model))
  y_name <- all.vars(formula(model))[1]
  d0 <- model.frame(model)
  bvec <- numeric(B)
  for (b in seq_len(B)) {
    y_star <- fit + res * sample(c(-1, 1), length(res), replace = TRUE)
    d_star <- d0
    d_star[[y_name]] <- y_star
    m_star <- try(lm(formula(model), data = d_star), silent = TRUE)
    bvec[b] <- if (inherits(m_star, "try-error")) NA_real_ else unname(coef(m_star)[term])
  }
  bvec <- bvec[!is.na(bvec)]
  c(lo = as.numeric(quantile(bvec, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)), hi = as.numeric(quantile(bvec, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)))
}

run_lp_pooled <- function(h, variant = c("linear", "nearest"), B = 399) {
  variant <- match.arg(variant)
  ph <- ifelse(variant == "linear", "share_PH2M_linear", "share_PH2M_nearest")
  wh <- ifelse(variant == "linear", "share_WH2M_linear", "share_WH2M_nearest")
  d <- panel |>
    group_by(uf_code) |>
    arrange(date, .by_group = TRUE) |>
    mutate(y_lead = lead(log_c, h), y_resp = y_lead - lag_log_c) |>
    ungroup() |>
    filter(!is.na(y_resp), !is.na(lag_log_c), !is.na(lag_mp_shock), !is.na(.data[[ph]]), !is.na(.data[[wh]]))
  rhs <- c("mp_shock", ph, wh, "lag_log_c", "lag_mp_shock", "factor(uf_code)")
  if (dplyr::n_distinct(d$month_num) > 1) rhs <- c(rhs, "factor(month_num)")
  if (dplyr::n_distinct(d$year) > 1) rhs <- c(rhs, "factor(year)")
  fml <- as.formula(paste("y_resp ~", paste(rhs, collapse = " + ")))
  m <- lm(fml, data = d)
  ct <- coeftest(m, vcov. = vcovCL(m, cluster = ~ uf_code, type = "HC1"))
  mp <- safe_get(ct, "mp_shock")
  mp_w <- wild_cluster_ci(m, d, "uf_code", "mp_shock", B = B)
  tibble(horizon = h, variant = variant, n_obs = nobs(m), beta_mp = mp[1], se_mp_cl = mp[2], lo95_mp_cl = beta_mp - 1.96 * se_mp_cl, hi95_mp_cl = beta_mp + 1.96 * se_mp_cl, lo95_mp_wild = mp_w["lo"], hi95_mp_wild = mp_w["hi"])
}

run_lp_state <- function(st, h, variant = c("linear", "nearest"), B = 399) {
  variant <- match.arg(variant)
  ph <- ifelse(variant == "linear", "share_PH2M_linear", "share_PH2M_nearest")
  wh <- ifelse(variant == "linear", "share_WH2M_linear", "share_WH2M_nearest")
  d <- panel |>
    filter(uf_code == st) |>
    arrange(date) |>
    mutate(y_lead = lead(log_c, h), y_resp = y_lead - lag_log_c) |>
    filter(!is.na(y_resp), !is.na(lag_log_c), !is.na(lag_mp_shock), !is.na(.data[[ph]]), !is.na(.data[[wh]]))
  rhs <- c("mp_shock", ph, wh, "lag_log_c", "lag_mp_shock")
  if (dplyr::n_distinct(d$month_num) > 1) rhs <- c(rhs, "factor(month_num)")
  if (dplyr::n_distinct(d$year) > 1) rhs <- c(rhs, "factor(year)")
  fml <- as.formula(paste("y_resp ~", paste(rhs, collapse = " + ")))
  m <- lm(fml, data = d)
  ct <- coeftest(m, vcov. = NeweyWest(m, lag = max(1, h), prewhite = FALSE, adjust = TRUE))
  mp <- safe_get(ct, "mp_shock")
  mp_w <- wild_state_ci(m, "mp_shock", B = B)
  tibble(uf_code = st, horizon = h, variant = variant, beta_mp = mp[1], se_mp = mp[2], lo95_mp = beta_mp - 1.96 * se_mp, hi95_mp = beta_mp + 1.96 * se_mp, lo95_mp_wild = mp_w["lo"], hi95_mp_wild = mp_w["hi"])
}
```

## Pooled IRFs: linear and nearest

```{r}
irf_linear <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(horizons, run_lp_pooled, variant = "linear", B = 399))
irf_nearest <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(horizons, run_lp_pooled, variant = "nearest", B = 399))
write.csv(irf_linear, file.path(csv_dir, "irf_lp_logcum_linear_h2m_clustered_fullmonths_wild.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(irf_nearest, file.path(csv_dir, "irf_lp_logcum_nearest_h2m_clustered_fullmonths_wild.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

## State-level IRFs (individual PNG per state)

```{r}
macro_cols <- c("North" = "#1b9e77", "Northeast" = "#d95f02", "Southeast" = "#7570b3", "South" = "#e7298a", "Center-West" = "#66a61e")
states <- sort(unique(panel$uf_code))
for (variant_i in c("linear", "nearest")) {
  irf_state <- crossing(uf_code = states, horizon = horizons) |>
    mutate(res = map2(uf_code, horizon, ~ run_lp_state(.x, .y, variant = variant_i, B = 399))) |>
    pull(res) |>
    list_rbind() |>
    left_join(base |> select(uf_code, uf_label, macro_region) |> distinct(), by = "uf_code")
  write.csv(irf_state, file.path(csv_dir, paste0("irf_state_by_state_", variant_i, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
  for (st in states) {
    d <- irf_state |> filter(uf_code == st)
    if (nrow(d) == 0) next
    reg <- d$macro_region[1]
    if (is.na(reg) || !(reg %in% names(macro_cols))) reg <- "Southeast"
    col <- macro_cols[[reg]]
    lbl <- d$uf_label[1]
    file_stub <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", lbl)
    p <- d |>
      ggplot(aes(horizon, beta_mp)) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray55") +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo95_mp, ymax = hi95_mp), fill = col, alpha = 0.20) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo95_mp_wild, ymax = hi95_mp_wild), fill = col, alpha = 0.10) +
      geom_line(color = col, linewidth = 0.9) +
      geom_point(color = col, size = 1.8) +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:12) +
      labs(title = paste0(lbl, " (", variant_i, " H2M)"), subtitle = paste0("Macro-region: ", reg), x = "Horizon (months)", y = "Cumulative log response") +
      theme_minimal()
    ggsave(file.path(state_png_dir, paste0("irf_state_mp_", variant_i, "_", file_stub, ".png")), p, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
  }
}
```
